name: Reuben Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion and celery.
2. Transfer the onion and celery to a Crock-Pot.
3. Stir in chicken broth and baking soda.
4. Combine cornstarch and water; add to the Crock-Pot.
5. Stir in sauerkraut, milk, and corned beef.
6. Cover and cook on High for 4 to 5 hours.
7. Stir in cheese and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Serve. Garnish with croutons if desired.
Serves 12.
